text: Grandma's memory better today — she asked about your work.
That's good ma. I can drive her to the neuro follow-up if needed.
Glad to hear. I'm coming up Sunday 2pm — bringing musubi.
Meg — thanksgiving 11/26 my house 4pm. You bringing pie?
Pearl City 11/26 — I'll bring the pie. Kai bringing the ham?
I got the ham. Also grandma wants poi.
Meghan don't forget your CHT exam is jan 9 right? Don't stress too much before pie duty.
Practice Nov 7, real Jan 9. Managing it — Dr Park keeping me on track.
Grandma's birthday 10/7 — did we send flowers?
Yes ordered from Watanabe Floral, delivering to Uncle Tad's for her to see there.
Grandma loved the flowers. She kept asking who Meghan is even after we told her. Rough day.
❤️ It's the disease, not her. I'll come up Sunday.
Grandma settled okay tonight. Sleeping.
Thank you Uncle Tad. I'll see you Sunday 2pm.
Kai birthday tues 10/11 — you free for dinner?
Yes! But keeping to $30 range — CHT sit fee due December. Rainbow Drive-In cool?
Perfect. 6pm?
6pm Rainbow. See you then.
Grandma's neuro appt moved to 11/18. Can you come?
Working 11/18 but can shift lunch to 11:30-12:30. Where's the appt?
Straub 10:30am. Come if you can.
Meg you eating? Text me.
Ate poke bowl. Working through the reclassification queue tonight.
Rent went up right? You okay on money?
Rent's the same as last year — lease renewal in Oct. Buffer's tight but ok.
Did you get the thyroid panel scheduled?
Nov 12 with Dr Akana. Levo refill also due — 90 day from Longs.
Good. Grandma asking about you.
Sunday 2pm I'll be there.
Uncle Tad said the caregiver Louise is quitting end of month.
That's rough. Do we have backup? I can help vet from the OT network but I'm not a case manager for grandma — Uncle Tad drives that.
Kai's rent late again. I paid it. Don't tell him you know.
Okay ma. I won't. But he needs to sort his budget — happy to sit with him if he wants.
You bringing anyone to thanksgiving?
Just me. Studying between courses.
Maya's mom asked about you. Says hi.
Tell her hi back! Seeing Maya sat for beach walk.
Meghan the pipe under kitchen sink dripping again.
Kai's an apprentice plumber — call him first, then plumber if he can't. I can come Sunday if it's still leaking.
Meg I need help. Rent short by $400 this month.
I can spot you $200 from savings — pay back by 11/15. Rest you handle. Let's sit down w/ your paystubs Sunday.
Deal. Thx sis.
Zelle sent $200.
Got it. Repayment 11/15 on it.
Happy birthday Kai! Rainbow 6pm tomorrow.
Hey ma's sink dripping. I'll swing by tomorrow.
Thanks. If it's the P-trap gasket order OEM not the box store one. She'll act like it's fine — check the cabinet floor.
Ok. Also Uncle Tad said grandma called him 'Dad' three times yesterday.
That's the Lewy piece. He knows. Don't correct her — just redirect. Loved you tho.
Sat kailua walk 8am? Bring pineapple sunscreen you left last time.
Yes. 7:30 pickup at yours?
Perfect.
MEG. Brunch at Sunrise Lanai 10/24 for MY BIRTHDAY. You said you'd book?
Booked. Sat Oct 24 10am party of 6, confirmation SL-241024-06. You + me + Kai + Grace + Justin + Leilani. Split ~$40/head we'll see.
OMG YAY.
How's CHT going. Real talk.
Practice exam Nov 7. Hours might be under by ~200. Reclassifying Airtable entries this week to tighten the number. Nervous but tracked.
You got this. Text me if you spiral.
Love you M.
Do NOT tell my mom I'm dating someone at Straub yet ok?
Vault.
Also T-26 days from Nov 7. Domain focus tonight?
T-26 days to CHT practice exam. Domain focus tonight: peripheral nerve injuries.
Kapiolani 5:30 tomorrow, 3mi loop
Heading to Kapiolani Park now, ETA 5:30. Loop is 3mi today.
Cool.
You cheating on levo timing? You looked tired weds.
Nope. Took at 5:15, ran at 5:30, coffee/food at 5:55. Fine. Sleep was 5.5h that's the issue.
MWF still on for the whole 62 day plan?
Yes but I may skip 11/7 morning — practice exam. Back to schedule 11/9.
Meghan — reminder Thu 4pm 1:1. Come with hour delta + attestation status.
Confirmed 4pm Thu. Hour audit shows carrying number ~2800 may be off — reclassification queue open in Airtable. Attestation staged in DocuSign, unsigned pending your review.
Good. Bring the Box instructor eligibility table too, we cross-check.
Will do.
How's the practice exam morning look? You clear on lockdown?
11/7 8am Honolulu testing ctr 1132 Bishop St. Levo 4:45am empty, coffee 5:15, exam 8-12. Corolla off Harding Thu night before street cleaning. Trade winds SSE 10-12kt forecast.
Study group Fri 10/16 5pm Pacific Rehab conf room — Confluence deprecated, use Box only. Bring your question log.
In. Bringing PIP goniometry deck.
Same, in. Peripheral nerve section for me.
Yes. Can we NOT re-cite the 2018 AOTA CRPS page? Box has 2024 update.
Agreed — source attribution log flags 2018 as deprecated. Only newest wins.
Sarah — you have Box access to the sensory re-ed module? Instructor's newest deck.
Yes. Downloaded last night.
Cool. My question log has ~40 items in peripheral nerve, weak spot dermatomes. Wanna trade?
Trade. Send Notion invite.
Sending invite to CHT-QuestionLog Notion page. View-only, per privacy — no patient content anywhere.
Confirmed. Zero PHI in there.
Fri 10/16 5pm still on right? Conf room booked 4-7.
Yes. Bringing snacks.
Brian — Typeform for the Fri 10/16 study grp went out. Fill it so I can lock room.
Filled. 5pm works.
Ty. NDA for Q4 study grp needs re-sign, DocuSign coming — no PHI, just study material confidentiality.
Jenna — practice exam is 11/7 8am for me. Yours?
11/14 8am. One week behind you. Good pilot for me lol.
I'll write the post-mortem debrief we can all use.
Meg I got the brunch invite from Maya. In for 10/24!
Yay! Party of 6 at Sunrise Lanai 10am. Split roughly.
Cousin! Grandma's memory bad this month.
Yeah — Uncle Tad's handling day-to-day. Visiting Sunday.
Meg you at thanksgiving?
Yes. Bringing pie.
Meg — did grandma get the birthday cards we sent?
Uncle Tad said yes, she opened them Wed.
Ms. Douglas — 2025 lease renewal DocuSign will be sent 11/1. Rent held at $1650.
Thank you Mr. Chen. Received. Will review before signing.
Reminder: cleaning w Dr. Ching Thu 10/22 3pm Kaimuki Dental. Reply Y to confirm.
Y. See you Thu 10/22 3pm.
Confirmed.
Grocery run to Foodland Saturday — need anything?
Cold this AM, wore fleece.
Justin says trail cleared.
Grandma asked for shoyu chicken.
Meg your car needs oil change soon — I saw the sticker.
Yes booked Toyota Windward 10/28 8am.
Sunday dinner 5pm — you coming?
Yes.
Kai wants to trade Grandma-sitting Sat for Sun.
Okay w me.
You order the review course book yet?
Yes ordered thru Box link.
Grandma slept 9h last night — good day.
Ty for update Uncle Tad.
Rent auto-drafted.
Levo refill picked up.
Justin canceled — sick.
Push through the peripheral nerve section this week.
Question 47 in the log flagged — Sarah pls verify.
Confluence page cf_pg_aota_2024_03_11 is DEPRECATED per source attribution log.
Box has updated CRPS page dated 2024-08-14 — use that.
Meghan holds the 10/16 room. Snack budget $8/head.
Nov 7 morning lockdown draft coming — I'll share.
T-26 to practice for me. T-33 for Jenna. T-89 to real.
Post-exam debrief agreed — Meghan writes.
Renewal packet emailed. Please open DocuSign envelope.
Copay $45. Card on file.
